description: You are a teaching assistant for a Distributed Systems course. Your library contains 20 seminal papers on systems research. Organize these papers into two collections based on their publication year. Create a collection named 'Classic Systems' for all papers published in 2004 or earlier, and a collection named 'Modern Systems' for all papers published in 2005 or later. Ensure every paper is assigned to exactly one collection and that collection names are exactly as specified.
